reviews.review_msg: Prof Hill isn't understanding, kind, or professional. Would recommend you take another class for your own benefit.
Steven works in the tangibles and intangibles of the class. It's almost like an immersive experience. Good luck, and don't worry if you crack, it comes back around.

Wonderful teacher - obviously a very smart guy and he knows what he is doing. He is a bit intimidating and expects a lot but if you want to learn and are willing to let yourself be open and work hard you will get a lot from the class.
One of the best classes I've ever taken. I grew and learned so much...There's no doubt he loves what he does.
